历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 1732 → 1824 → 1933 → 1506 → 1508. After a significant advance in 2024, it remained basically stable at 1508 in 2025, and has been generally stable around 1500 in the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 1508. The provincial science/physics enrollment plan was 30 in 2021, 30 in 2022, 29 in 2023, 24 in 2024, and 36 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 30, a reduction of about 16.7% compared to 36 in 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; ranked 20th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, stable in the 20–22 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of national universities. In 2026, reputation is slightly negative (PPT disparaging other majors caused controversy, students reported exam cheating issues), but overall impact is limited. Douyin popularity is average (ranked 66th overall), with stable application attention. No enrollment gaps from 2021 to 2025, admissions are stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 20 disciplines are rated A- or above, including Chemical Engineering and Technology, Management Science and Engineering as A+, and Instrument Science and Technology, Optical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Architecture, Mechanical Engineering, etc. as A. The disciplines are strong, attracting many candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and other advantageous majors at Tianjin University are all highly recommended, with social heat for related major categories continuing to rise. In 2026, the estimated number of physics category candidates in Yunnan Province is about 229,000, an increase of about 32.3% compared to 173,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1508, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 16.7%, the significant increase of about 32.3% in physics category candidates in Yunnan Province leading to intensified competition, along with stable school reputation and strong appeal of advantageous disciplines, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 1387, with a range of 1221–1553.
